summary: Affordable housing starts fell to a recent low in fiscal 2022 amid rising construction costs and HPD staffing shortages, then climbed each year after as the agency's pipeline recovered — helped by a surge in new construction financed through the 421-a tax-exemption program, which pushed fiscal 2025 starts to their second-highest new-construction total on record.
oneLiner: increasing as the pipeline recovered, helped by the 421-a tax program
